commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an official external PixVerse video-generation provider package with plugin registration, setup wizard auth/region handling, video runtime support, docs, catalog metadata, config schema support, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +913, Tests +804, Docs +191, Config +64, Other +51. Total +2023 across 41 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds a new official provider feature rather than fixing a reproduced bug. The relevant evidence is the diff, PixVerse API docs, targeted tests, live PixVerse smokes, and CI/proof context in the PR body.
commands.review_followup: Human maintainer/secops review is the remaining action because the PR changes official provider publication, config/default contracts, and release metadata rather than leaving a narrow automation repair.

target.title: feat(pixverse): add external video provider
target.body:
## Summary
- add PixVerse as an official external provider package, `@openclaw/pixverse-provider`, with npm/ClawHub metadata, package-local shrinkwrap, plugin manifest/contract registration, generated plugin docs, and official external provider catalog metadata
- add PixVerse text-to-video and image-to-video inference, including local/remote image upload, async status polling, hosted video URL return, model mapping for `v6` and `c1`, and explicit capability metadata
- add the PixVerse setup wizard: it prompts for International vs CN, shows the selected API base URL, writes `models.providers.pixverse.region`, `baseUrl`, and schema-required `models: []`, preserves custom base URLs unless the user explicitly changes region, and sets the video-generation default without touching the text model default
- document International/CN configuration, API base URLs, manual override shape, model refs, and live-test env routing for the external plugin
- add shared video-resolution normalization for 360P/540P and keep image-style `K` resolutions from being downgraded into video-style `P` resolutions
- keep PixVerse out of the bundled core npm artifact by excluding `dist/extensions/pixverse/**` from the root package files list

## Historical context
- no dedicated PixVerse issue or PR turned up in Gitcrawl/live GitHub search
- related prior work: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/73038 added DeepInfra video fallback coverage using a PixVerse-hosted DeepInfra model
- related open work: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/84549 is about DeepInfra dynamic catalog loading, not the official PixVerse API

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/video-generation/runtime.test.ts src/video-generation/provider-registry.test.ts src/image-generation/provider-registry.test.ts src/media-generation/runtime-shared.test.ts` passed: 4 files, 50 tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/pixverse/index.test.ts extensions/pixverse/video-generation-provider.test.ts extensions/pixverse/plugin-registration.contract.test.ts src/plugins/provider-install-catalog.test.ts test/plugin-npm-package-manifest.test.ts test/package-manager-config.test.ts src/media-generation/provider-capabilities.contract.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts src/config/config-misc.test.ts src/media-understanding/shared.test.ts src/media-generation/runtime-shared.test.ts` passed: 11 files, 208 tests
- `git diff --check` passed
- `node scripts/generate-plugin-inventory-doc.mjs --check` passed
- `node scripts/generate-npm-shrinkwrap.mjs --check --package-dir extensions/pixverse` passed
- `node --import tsx scripts/generate-base-config-schema.ts --check` passed
- targeted secret scan over PixVerse/plugin docs and touched media registry paths found no test keys, phone number, account id, or nickname
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-pixverse.tsbuildinfo` still fails only on existing unrelated `libopus-wasm` and `rastermill` type drift; no PixVerse or wizard errors
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test-pixverse.tsbuildinfo` still fails only on the same unrelated `libopus-wasm` and `rastermill` type drift; no changed-test errors
- direct live CN PixVerse smoke passed with transient redacted credentials and `models.providers.pixverse.region = "cn"`: text-to-video completed in 16.8s and image-to-video completed in 17.6s, each returning one hosted video URL
- live International PixVerse harness passed after billing was unblocked: text-to-video completed in 16.1s and image-to-video completed in 21.6s, each returning one video
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` clean on the final wizard/CI-fix delta: no accepted/actionable findings
- manual CI for final head `b1066791c154da4637d76f0bef35402591a08080` completed with 60 passing jobs, 1 skipped job, and 1 unrelated failure: `build-artifacts` fails at `pnpm ui:i18n:check` because of existing Control UI raw-copy baseline drift in `ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.ts` and `ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.ts`; no PixVerse/provider jobs failed: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26498906094
- Testbox-through-Crabbox proof is currently blocked by missing Blacksmith auth in this environment; direct AWS Crabbox proof is currently blocked by AWS security-group rule quota during lease creation, so final remote coverage is the manual GitHub Actions CI run above plus the earlier live PixVerse API smokes

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: PixVerse text-to-video and image-to-video can be installed as the official external PixVerse provider package; the setup wizard collects an API key, asks for International or CN, displays the API base URL for that choice, writes region/baseUrl config, and sets a video-generation default; image references are uploaded to PixVerse before image-to-video creation, async status is polled with fresh PixVerse trace IDs and guarded OpenClaw provider transport, and the video URL is returned.
Real environment tested: mocked provider API locally; local setup-wizard config behavior; live International PixVerse API text-to-video and image-to-video; live CN PixVerse API text-to-video and image-to-video with `models.providers.pixverse.region = "cn"`; final manual GitHub Actions CI on the branch SHA, with one unrelated Control UI i18n baseline failure.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused Vitest commands above, generated docs check above, package-local shrinkwrap check above, config schema check above, direct CN PixVerse smoke with transient redacted credentials, International PixVerse live harness, autoreview command above, and manual CI run above.
Evidence after fix: focused tests passed on the pushed branch; generated plugin inventory/reference docs, config schema baseline, and PixVerse shrinkwrap checks passed; live International and CN PixVerse requests completed authenticated text-to-video and image-to-video generation with one generated video returned for each mode; autoreview returned clean; manual CI completed with no PixVerse/provider failures.
Observed result after fix: PixVerse request bodies, upload flow, polling flow, provider metadata, setup wizard region/baseUrl persistence, external package metadata, official external provider catalog entry, generated docs, resolution normalization, API region selection, provider request overrides, and guarded polling headers are covered by targeted tests; live PixVerse auth, generation submission, status polling, and video URL return are confirmed for both text-to-video and image-to-video on International and CN API surfaces.
What was not tested: PixVerse video-to-video, because this provider does not advertise video-to-video support; generated video downloads were not persisted or attached.
target.author: vincentkoc
